response.justification: Well over the required 6 years of fullstack experience with a stack that closely matches the role: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes all appear across recent positions. Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement, and a strong testing/TDD background (test libraries authored, TDD practice at RIDE) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are limited to specific framework exposure (Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest) that a developer of this caliber should pick up quickly.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS
Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling development in current role
Deep testing culture: TDD practice, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated
Significant portfolio time in DLang, a niche language outside the role's stack
